title: polyscias excelsa
intro: Polyscias excelsa, also known as the Pineapple Guava or Pigi, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Araliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Polyscias excelsa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by extracting its essential oils using solvents like ethanol or hexane.
